ddls:
CREATE TABLE "datasets" (
  "file_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each dataset file */,
  "file_path" TEXT /* Path to the dataset file on the server */,
  "feature_1" INTEGER /* Feature 1 extracted from the dataset */,
  "feature_2" INTEGER /* Feature 2 extracted from the dataset */,
  "feature_3" INTEGER /* Feature 3 extracted from the dataset */,
  "feature_4" INTEGER /* Feature 4 extracted from the dataset */,
  "feature_5" INTEGER /* Feature 5 extracted from the dataset */,
  "feature_6" INTEGER /* Feature 6 extracted from the dataset */,
  "result" INTEGER /* Classification result (0 for unencrypted, 1 for encrypted) */,
  "upload_date" TEXT /* Date the file was uploaded */,
  "file_size" REAL /* Size of the file in MB */,
  "classification_model_id" INTEGER /* ID of the classification model used to classify the dataset */,
  "file_status" TEXT /* Status of the file (e.g., uploaded, processed, archived) */,
  "file_format" TEXT /* Format of the file (e.g., CSV, JSON, Parquet) */,
  "source_network" TEXT /* Network or source where the data was captured */,
  "data_quality_score" REAL /* Score indicating the quality of the data */,
  "labeling_status" TEXT /* Status of the labeling (e.g., labeled, unlabeled) */,
  "version" TEXT /* Version of the dataset */,
  "tags" TEXT /* Tags for easier filtering and searching */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("file_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_datasets_classification_model_id FOREIGN KEY ("classification_model_id") REFERENCES classification_models ("model_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "classification_models" (
  "model_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each classification model */,
  "model_name" TEXT /* Name of the model */,
  "model_version" TEXT /* Version of the model */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the model */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date the model was created */,
  "last_trained_date" TEXT /* Date the model was last trained */,
  "accuracy" REAL /* Accuracy of the model */,
  "model_type" TEXT /* Type of the model (e.g., supervised, unsupervised, deep learning) */,
  "training_data_source" TEXT /* Source of the training data */,
  "hyperparameters" TEXT /* Hyperparameters used in the model training */,
  "training_duration" TEXT /* Duration of the training process */,
  "model_path" TEXT /* Path to the trained model file */,
  "tags" TEXT /* Tags for easier filtering and searching */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("model_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., data scientist, security analyst, admin) */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department the user belongs to */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date the user account was created */,
  "last_login_date" TEXT /* Date of the user's last login */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the user account (e.g., active, inactive, suspended) */,
  "permissions" TEXT /* Permissions assigned to the user (e.g., read, write, admin) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "file_id" INTEGER /* ID of the dataset file being accessed */,
  "model_id" INTEGER /* ID of the classification model being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the dataset or model */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the dataset or model was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download, train) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user accessing the system */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent (e.g., browser, operating system) of the user */,
  "session_id" TEXT /* Session ID of the user */,
  "access_duration" TEXT /* Duration of the access event */,
  "data_size_accessed" REAL /* Amount of data accessed in MB */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_model_id FOREIGN KEY ("model_id") REFERENCES classification_models ("model_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_file_id FOREIGN KEY ("file_id") REFERENCES datasets ("file_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "model_performance" (
  "performance_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each performance record */,
  "model_id" INTEGER /* ID of the classification model */,
  "evaluation_date" TEXT /* Date when the model was evaluated */,
  "accuracy" REAL /* Accuracy of the model */,
  "precision" REAL /* Precision of the model */,
  "recall" REAL /* Recall of the model */,
  "f1_score" REAL /* F1 score of the model */,
  "training_data_version" TEXT /* Version of the training data used */,
  "validation_accuracy" REAL /* Accuracy on the validation set */,
  "test_accuracy" REAL /* Accuracy on the test set */,
  "confusion_matrix" TEXT /* Confusion matrix as a JSON string */,
  "roc_auc_score" REAL /* ROC AUC score */,
  "comments" TEXT /* Comments or notes about the performance evaluation */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("performance_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_model_performance_model_id FOREIGN KEY ("model_id") REFERENCES classification_models ("model_id")
)
